choices: Play Lisa's saxophone
Prank call Moe's tavern
Her diaper is clean & dry and tries out Lisa's potty chair who shows up
Watch cartoons and eats whatever she wants
Drink a few cans of duff beer and drives Homer's car to Moe's
1.content: Maggie wakes up well rested in her crib and gets out to find mom or Lisa. Maggie immediately starts to worry and realize that she's been left behind. What does Maggie do now that she's been left behind?
1.title: What does Maggie do immediately once home alone

choices: Pee
Poop
Pee and poop
13.content:
Hmm Maggie thinks to herself as she checks her diaper. Wow my diaper isn't wet or dirty, and so she decides to get out Lisa's old potty, pull ups, and toddler clothes. So once she has all of Lisa's toddler stuff out of her closet. She begins by taking her diaper and putting a pull up on. Wow these feel a lot better than my diaper and were easier to put on.

When all of a sudden just as she went to try on one of Lisa's toddler outfits. She immediately realizes that she has to go potty, and so she walk over to Lisa's old potty and sits down on it. Oops silly me I forgot to pull my pull up down, and it's a good thing she remembered to pull her pull up down. Once her pull up is down she immediately started going potty on Lisa's old potty. What did she go on the potty?
13.title: Her diaper is clean & dry and tries out Lisa...

choices: Stewie Griffin
Gerald Samson and Mrs. Samson because today is Maggie's play date with him
Ned Flanders
131.content: Maggie sighs of a sign of relief as she pees on the potty. A few minutes later she's all done and gets up and says. Wow I can't believe I had to pee that bad and I'm glad I didn't go in my diaper. So Maggie picks up the removable bowl from the potty to empty it. When all of a sudden there's a knock on the front door. Who's at the door?
131.title: Pee

choices: Mrs. Samson asks Maggie what happened to her onesie
Gerald says I thought you loved your onesie
Maggie tells them why she doesn't have her onesie on. which shocks them
1312.content:
Maggie quickly empties the removable bowl out her bedroom window before going downstairs. Once downstairs Maggie goes over to the front door and says very cutely. "Who's there?" Mrs. Samson whispers to Gerald before answering Maggie's question. "I have never heard Maggie answer the door before today!" Gerald quickly whispers back. "Mommy I have never even heard her talk until just now!"

Mrs. Samson then says. "Maggie it's Mrs. Samson and Gerald, and did your mom forget your play date with Gerald today." Maggie then says. "Um my whole family went on vacation without me!" Mrs. Samson then says. "Well in that case I'll stay here while you and Gerald play together." So with that said Maggie opens the door and lets Gerald and Mrs. Samson inside. What happens next?
1312.title: Gerald Samson and Mrs. Samson because today is ...

choices: Stewie Griffin
Gerald Samson and Mrs. Samson because today is Maggie's play date with him
Ned Flanders

info.brief_description: The Simpson's go on a family vacation with a big problem they forgot to bring Maggie.
info.description: Almost anything can happen in this story except death.
